testcase.name: Verify dashboard page is displayed after login
testcase.system-out: @dashboard00001 Scenario: Verify dashboard page is displayed after login # src/test/resources/features/dashboard.feature:5 browswer opened successfully Login page opened Given user opens login page # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_opens_login_page() Username entered : admin-user@indigate.in When user enters username "admin-user@indigate.in" # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_Enters_Username(java.lang.String) And user enters password "User@12345" # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_password(java.lang.String) log in button clicked successfully login button clicked And user clicks login # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_click_login() the dashboard text which is fetched is :Dashboard Then dashboard should display # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.dashboard_should_display() browser closed
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. Jun 08, 2026 8:00:49 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 148 Jun 08, 2026 8:00:49 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 148.0.7778.217. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.33.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: Verify daily volume refresh
testcase.system-out: @dashboard00001 Scenario: Verify daily volume refresh # src/test/resources/features/dashboard.feature:14 browswer opened successfully Login page opened Given user opens login page # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_opens_login_page() Username entered : admin-user@indigate.in When user enters username "admin-user@indigate.in" # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_Enters_Username(java.lang.String) And user enters password "User@12345" # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_password(java.lang.String) log in button clicked successfully login button clicked And user clicks login # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_click_login() the dashboard text which is fetched is :Dashboard Then dashboard should display # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.dashboard_should_display() daily meta button is clicked When user clicks daily volume button # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.user_click_daily_meta() daily volume is fetched succeffully : By.xpath: //div[text()='Today']/ancestor::div[contains(@class,'stats-card')]//div[contains(@class,'stats-value')] Daily volume value is : Then daily updated data should display # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.user_Fetch_daily_volume() browser closed

testcase.name: Verify week card opens client selection popup
testcase.system-out: @dashboard00001 Scenario: Verify week card opens client selection popup # src/test/resources/features/dashboard.feature:25 browswer opened successfully Login page opened Given user opens login page # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_opens_login_page() Username entered : admin-user@indigate.in When user enters username "admin-user@indigate.in" # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_Enters_Username(java.lang.String) And user enters password "User@12345" # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_password(java.lang.String) log in button clicked successfully login button clicked And user clicks login # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_click_login() the dashboard text which is fetched is :Dashboard Then dashboard should display # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.dashboard_should_display() week meta button has been clicked When user clicks this week volume button # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.user_clicks_week_meta_button() the popup client text is :👥 Select a Client to View Weekly Data the client text fetched successfully Then client selection card should display before displaying the week data # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.client_selection_card_should_display_before_displaying_the_week_data() browser closed

testcase.name: Verify week card data after selecting client
testcase.system-out: @dashboard00001 Scenario: Verify week card data after selecting client # src/test/resources/features/dashboard.feature:36 browswer opened successfully Login page opened Given user opens login page # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_opens_login_page() Username entered : admin-user@indigate.in When user enters username "admin-user@indigate.in" # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_Enters_Username(java.lang.String) And user enters password "User@12345" # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_password(java.lang.String) log in button clicked successfully login button clicked And user clicks login # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_click_login() the dashboard text which is fetched is :Dashboard Then dashboard should display # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.dashboard_should_display() week meta button has been clicked When user clicks this week volume button # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.user_clicks_week_meta_button() the popup client text is :👥 Select a Client to View Weekly Data the client text fetched successfully Then client selection card should display before displaying the week data # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.client_selection_card_should_display_before_displaying_the_week_data() Client selected and popup closed Client selected and popup closed And user select the particular client # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.user_select_the_particular_client() 0.00 Then the client Weekly data should display # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.the_client_Weekly_data_should_display() browser closed

testcase.name: Verify selected client can be deselected
testcase.system-out: @dashboard00001 Scenario: Verify selected client can be deselected # src/test/resources/features/dashboard.feature:49 browswer opened successfully Login page opened Given user opens login page # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_opens_login_page() Username entered : admin-user@indigate.in When user enters username "admin-user@indigate.in" # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_Enters_Username(java.lang.String) And user enters password "User@12345" # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_password(java.lang.String) log in button clicked successfully login button clicked And user clicks login # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_click_login() the dashboard text which is fetched is :Dashboard Then dashboard should display # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.dashboard_should_display() week meta button has been clicked When user clicks this week volume button # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.user_clicks_week_meta_button() Client selected and popup closed Client selected and popup closed And user select the particular client # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.user_select_the_particular_client() 0.00 Then the client Weekly data should display # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.the_client_Weekly_data_should_display() And deselect the selected client # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.deselect_the_selected_client() browser closed

testcase.name: verify the functionality of custom date range selection
testcase.system-out:
@dashboard00001 Scenario: verify the functionality of custom date range selection # src/test/resources/features/dashboard.feature:88 browswer opened successfully Login page opened Given user opens login page # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_opens_login_page() Username entered : admin-user@indigate.in When user enters username "admin-user@indigate.in" # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_Enters_Username(java.lang.String) And user enters password "User@12345" # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_enters_password(java.lang.String) log in button clicked successfully login button clicked And user clicks login # stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.user_click_login() the dashboard text which is fetched is :Dashboard Then dashboard should display # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.dashboard_should_display() When user clicks on date range selection button # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.user_clicks_on_date_range_selection_button() Internal Test client selected successfully And user select the particular client in customdate range # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.user_select_the_particular_client_inDateRange() providers has been selected And user select the particular provider # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.user_select_the_particular_provider() From Date entered : 03/06/2026 And select From date # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.select_From_and_To_date() 08/06/2026 And select To date # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.select_To_date() And click on the apply button # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.click_on_the_apply_button()
Then The particular clients data should be display with the selected date # stepDefinitions.DashboardSteps.The_particular_clients_data_should_be_display_with_the_selected_date() browser closed
testcase.system-err: Jun 08, 2026 8:02:03 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 148 Jun 08, 2026 8:02:03 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 148.0.7778.217. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.33.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
